name: @zts/web
description: ZTS web platform — dev server + HMR overlay + postcss/sass pipeline + dev controller

scripts.build:bundle: node ../core/bin/zts.mjs --bundle src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --format=esm --target=node --external @zts/core --external postcss --external postcss-load-config --external sass
scripts.build: bun run build:bundle && bun run build:dts
